name: newsnexus12
description: Root orchestration package for the NewsNexus12 monorepo.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @newsnexus/db-models && npm run build --workspace @newsnexus/db-manager && npm run build --workspace newsnexus12api && npm run build --workspace newsnexus12-worker-node && npm run build --workspace newsnexus12portal
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace @newsnexus/db-models && npm run build --workspace @newsnexus/db-manager && npm run build --workspace newsnexus12api && npm run build --workspace newsnexus12-worker-node
